title: abeec 10-Tub Soft Dough for Toddlers | Rainbow Colour Modelling Dough Set | Colourful Sensory Clay for Kids Age 3+ | Non-Toxic Party Bag Filler Compound for Creative Play & Crafts
features: 10 Bright Dough Colours: This modelling dough pack includes 10 vibrant tubs of colourful, squishable compound to spark creativity in toddlers and children aged 3+. Each tub is packed with soft dough that can be shaped, rolled, and moulded with ease.

Creative & Sensory Learning: Ideal for early years development, these dough tubs help enhance fine motor skills, colour recognition, and imaginative thinking through squishing, sculpting, and sensory play
Mess-Free & Easy Storage: Each tub comes with a resealable lid to keep dough fresh between uses. Less mess, more play! Ideal for school, nursery, or play-at-home environments
Safe & Child-Friendly Formula: The non-toxic formula ensures the dough is safe for little hands, and the smooth texture is easy to mould without sticking or crumbling
Perfect Party Bag Filler: A popular choice for birthday parties, classroom rewards, and stocking fillers. Each 113g tub offers plenty of creative playtime and vibrant variety
description: Let creativity take shape with the abeec 10 Tubs of Modelling Dough – a vibrant set designed to bring colour and imagination into every play session. Whether it's a frog, flower, or fun-shaped snack, children can mould their ideas into reality using soft, pliable dough that's safe, sensory-friendly, and fun to use. With 10 different colours in every pack, kids can mix, blend, and shape to their heart's content. Great for party bags, early years classrooms, and rainy-day activities, each tub comes in a resealable container, ensuring the dough stays soft between uses. The formula is non-toxic, smooth to the touch, and ideal for toddlers aged 3 and above. Encourage creative exploration with abeec's colourful dough tubs—where every squeeze, squish, and sculpt supports fine motor skills, imaginative thinking, and joyful expression.
